A

addCollidable(Collidable) - Method in class game.GameEnvironment
Add the given collidable to the environment.
addCollidable(Collidable) - Method in class game.GameLevel
Add a collidable to the environment.
addSprite(Sprite) - Method in class game.GameLevel
Adds a sprite to the level.
Alien - Class in sprites
A single alien.
Alien(double, double, double, double, Color) - Constructor for class sprites.Alien
Construct an Alien.
animation - package animation
 
Animation - Interface in animation
Interface representing a single screen or state (like the game itself, a pause screen, or a countdown).
AnimationRunner - Class in animation
A class that takes an Animation object and runs it.
AnimationRunner(GUI, int) - Constructor for class animation.AnimationRunner
Create a new AnimationRunner.

B

Block - Class in sprites
A simple rectangular block.
Block(double, double, double, double, Color) - Constructor for class sprites.Block
Construct a shield/block tile.

C

Collidable - Interface in interfaces
An object that can be collided with (like aliens, shields, and the spaceship).
consumeHit() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Consume the hit flag if set.

D

deactivate() - Method in class sprites.Shot
Deactivate the shot (e.g., on hit).
doOneFrame(DrawSurface) - Method in interface animation.Animation
Process a single frame of the animation.
doOneFrame(DrawSurface) - Method in class game.GameLevel
Process a single frame of the animation.
doOneFrame(DrawSurface) - Method in class game.StartScreen
 
drawOn(DrawSurface) - Method in interface interfaces.Sprite
Draw the sprite to the screen.
drawOn(DrawSurface) - Method in class sprites.Alien
Draw the alien sprite or a fallback rectangle.
drawOn(DrawSurface) - Method in class sprites.Block
Draw the block using an image if available, else fallback to colored rect.
drawOn(DrawSurface) - Method in class sprites.Shot
 
drawOn(DrawSurface) - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Draw the sprite to the screen.

G

game - package game
 
GameEnvironment - Class in game
A class to hold and manage all the Collidable objects.
GameEnvironment() - Constructor for class game.GameEnvironment
Construct an empty game environment.
GameFlow - Class in game
A high-level class to manage the sequence of animations.
GameFlow(AnimationRunner, KeyboardSensor) - Constructor for class game.GameFlow
Construct a GameFlow manager.
GameLevel - Class in game
This class represents a single level and implements the Animation interface.
GameLevel(KeyboardSensor) - Constructor for class game.GameLevel
Construct a GameLevel driven by a KeyboardSensor.
geometry - package geometry
 
get(String) - Static method in class game.ImageManager
Load image from path (relative to working dir or classpath) with caching.
getClosestCollision(Rectangle) - Method in class game.GameEnvironment
Check for collision with the given rectangle.
getCollidables() - Method in class game.GameEnvironment
Get all collidables in the environment.
getCollisionRectangle() - Method in interface interfaces.Collidable
Return the "collision shape" of the object.
getCollisionRectangle() - Method in class sprites.Alien
Get alien collision rectangle.
getCollisionRectangle() - Method in class sprites.Block
 
getCollisionRectangle() - Method in class sprites.Shot
 
getCollisionRectangle() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Get the collision rectangle representing the ship.
getHeight() - Method in class geometry.Rectangle
Get the height of the rectangle.
getHeight() - Method in class sprites.Alien
 
getHeight() - Method in class sprites.Block
 
getHeight() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
 
getScaled(String, int, int) - Static method in class game.ImageManager
Get a scaled Image for the given path and target size (uses cache).
getScore() - Method in class game.GameLevel
 
getSpeed() - Method in class sprites.Alien
 
getTotalScore() - Method in class game.GameFlow
 
getWidth() - Method in class geometry.Rectangle
Get the width of the rectangle.
getWidth() - Method in class sprites.Alien
 
getWidth() - Method in class sprites.Block
 
getWidth() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip

H

hit() - Method in interface interfaces.Collidable
Notify the object that we collided with it.
hit() - Method in class sprites.Alien
Handle a hit and mark alien as dead.
hit() - Method in class sprites.Block
 
hit() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Notify the object that we collided with it.
hitEvent(Object) - Method in interface interfaces.HitListener
Called when a hit occurs on the observed object.
HitListener - Interface in interfaces
Listener for hit events on game objects.

I

ImageManager - Class in game
Utility for loading and caching images from disk or classpath.
ImageManager() - Constructor for class game.ImageManager
 
initialize() - Method in class game.GameLevel
Initialize the level: create the fleet of aliens, the shields, and the spaceship.
interfaces - package interfaces
 
intersects(Rectangle) - Method in class geometry.Rectangle
Check if this rectangle intersects with another rectangle.
isActive() - Method in class sprites.Shot
 
isAlive() - Method in class sprites.Alien
 
isDestroyed() - Method in class sprites.Block
 
isFromPlayer() - Method in class sprites.Shot
 

L

loopMusic(String, double) - Static method in class game.SoundManager
Start looping background music.

M

move() - Method in class sprites.Shot
Move the shot by its velocity and deactivate when leaving screen.
move(double, double) - Method in class sprites.Alien
Move alien by delta.
moveLeft() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Move ship left within screen bounds.
moveRight(double) - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Move ship right within given screen width.

P

playEffect(String, double) - Static method in class game.SoundManager
Play a short sound effect.

R

Rectangle - Class in geometry
A rectangle defined by its upper-left corner coordinates and dimensions.
Rectangle(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class geometry.Rectangle
Create a new rectangle with the specified location and dimensions.
removeCollidable(Collidable) - Method in class game.GameEnvironment
Remove the given collidable from the environment.
removeCollidable(Collidable) - Method in class game.GameLevel
Remove a collidable from the environment.
removeSprite(Sprite) - Method in class game.GameLevel
Remove a sprite from the level.
run(Animation) - Method in class animation.AnimationRunner
Run the given animation.
runLevels(List<GameLevel>) - Method in class game.GameFlow
Run a sequence of levels until completion or failure.

S

setFromPlayer(boolean) - Method in class sprites.Shot
Mark whether this shot originates from the player (true) or aliens (false).
setGameEnvironment(GameEnvironment) - Method in class sprites.Shot
Wire the game environment to enable collision checks.
setImageIndex(int) - Method in class sprites.Alien
Choose image index 0..4 to pick alien frame.
setImagePath(String) - Method in class sprites.Shot
Set the image path for this shot (e.g., alien shot vs player shot).
setSpeed(double) - Method in class sprites.Alien
Set alien speed.
shoot() - Method in class sprites.SpaceShip
Fire a new shot from the ship's top center.
Shot - Class in sprites
The projectile.
Shot(double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class sprites.Shot
Construct a Shot.
shouldStop() - Method in interface animation.Animation
Check if the animation should stop.
shouldStop() - Method in class game.GameLevel
Check if the animation should stop.
shouldStop() - Method in class game.StartScreen
 
SoundManager - Class in game
Centralized lightweight sound manager.
SpaceShip - Class in sprites
The player's ship.
SpaceShip(double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class sprites.SpaceShip
Construct a SpaceShip.
Sprite - Interface in interfaces
An object that can be drawn on the screen and notified that time has passed.
sprites - package sprites
 
StartScreen - Class in game
Simple start screen that waits for the player to press SPACE.
StartScreen(KeyboardSensor) - Constructor for class game.StartScreen
Construct start screen.
stop() - Method in class game.GameLevel
Stop the level loop.
stopMusic() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
Stop background music if any.

T
